remember: Recall the different landforms and their characteristics
Identify the major physiographic divisions of India
List the different types of mountains in India
understand: Explain the concept of structure and physiography
Describe the formation of different landforms
Discuss the importance of physiography in understanding the environment
apply: Apply the concepts of structure and physiography to identify landforms in a given region
Use physiographic features to understand the climate and natural resources of a region
Analyze the impact of human activities on the physiography of a region
analyze: Analyze the relationship between physiography and climate in a given region
Compare the physiography of different regions and identify similarities and differences
Evaluate the impact of physiography on the economy and culture of a region

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of structure and physiography and their importance in understanding the Earth's surface.
Describe the major physiographic divisions of India and their characteristics.
Discuss the formation of different landforms and their role in shaping the environment.
board_exam_objectives: Identify and describe the major physiographic divisions of India (Board Exam)
Explain the formation and characteristics of different landforms (Board Exam)
Discuss the importance of physiography in understanding the environment and natural resources (Board Exam)
